items.h: Thekla Addresses NJPW Star Yota Tsuji's Call For AEW Boycott
items.p: IWGP Heavyweight Champion Yota Tsuji ruffled some feathers when he called for an AEW boycott ahead of the co-branded Forbidden Door show.
